description: Organic membrane texture combining Worley cells with curl noise displacement for biological alien surfaces.
example_prompts: use Worley cells displaced by curl noise for alien membrane textures
create biological organic surface by multiplying cellular noise with FBM
generate slimy alien skin using curl-warped Worley and soft FBM overlay

screenshot_metadata.notes: Use green-teal color ramp. Animate curl noise slowly for pulsing effect.
